title: SpaceFrog's Hungry Hungry Frogs
description: Frogs extra hungry & extra powerful: Frogs can eat any hostile mob, and the elusive, immortal, insatiable ÜberFrog will one-shot kill any hostile! You can also make a frog your pet!
body:
## _Version 6 has arrived!_ This version's got a lot going on: new frog buffs, The ÜberFrog's gotten even more wild, make frogs your pets, and compatibility with frog bucket mods.
### Frogs Are Buff & Hungry! This datapack massively upgrades Minecraft frogs: The default health of frogs has increased from 10 HP to 20 HP (same as the player). Frogs will attack any hostile mob, and a regular frog will do 50 HP of damage - that's enough to take out most hostiles in the game like zombies and creepers, but the heavy hitters like Wardens will still be able to put up a fight. This datapack only includes hostiles for the vanilla game, but if you're running some or all of the mods as the FroggyCraft Modpack, you might want to check out [**_SpaceFrog's Hungry Hungry Frogs \*FroggyCraft Addon\*_**]( https://modrinth.com/datapack/spacefrogs-hungry-hungry-frogs-froggycraft-addon) datapack.
### The ÜberFrog This pack also adds a rare frog variant, The ÜberFrog – and elusive, immortal, insatiable frog that can one-shot kill any hostile mob - they make great guard-frogs for your base. You can spot when The ÜberFrog spawns in your world by its overly dramatic entrance as shown; it will keep a glowing effect for 20 seconds after it spawns, and after that you'll still be able to spot The ÜberFrog by the particle effects it produces and its custom name. Keep in mind The ÜberFrog is rare - there's only a 1 in about 300 chance of any random frog spawning in your world becoming a The ÜberFrog (there can in fact be more than one The ÜberFrog in the world, "The ÜberFrog" is just its full legal name). In creative mode, you can summon The ÜberFrog with this command: ``` /function hungry_frog:user_summon_uberfrog ``` You can convert any regular frog into The ÜberFrog by standing close to them and running this command: ``` /function hungry_frog:user_uberfrog_convert ``` And you can turn any ÜberFrog back into a regular frog by standing close to them and running this command: ``` /function hungry_frog:user_uberfrog_undo ```
### Pet Frogs Make any from your pet by naming them with a name tag. Once names, your pet frog will still have a mind of their own and will wander away, but powered by your love, they'll gain Regeneration 1, Resistance 1, and Fire Resistance effects permanently! When The ÜberFrog is renamed, it won't get these effects since they aren’t needed but the particle effects it normally emits will disappear.
### Compatible with Bucket Mods This datapack is compatible with the [**_Bucket of Frog_**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bucket-of-frog) mod, it's fully tested for the versions of Minecraft this mod is currently available on. Newer version of Minecraft running other mods that allow you to carry frogs in buckets are not tested, but the datapack should be compatible with them too (please report any bugs you encounter with other mods).
Troubleshooting
  • Using the "/function hungry_frog:user_uberfrog_convert" command might leave the AI of the frog confused and unwilling to attack mobs until you reload your world. This issue occurs in some versions of Minecraft but not others and is unresolved. Reloading your world or placing the frog in a bucket and dispensing it are easy workarounds that reset the frog's AI.
  • The Bucket of Frog mod is the only mod that allows you to store frogs in buckets that this datapack is validated to be compatible with. If you're using another mod, normal frogs will not be affected but the properties of The ÜberFrog might be lost depending on how the mod stores frog data in the bucket item. If you encounter an issue, please join the Discord and let me know what mod you're using so the datapack can be updated and made compatible with it.
  • If you're not finding any ÜberFrogs spawning naturally in your world or when breeding frogs, ensure the datapack is running. You can tell if it's running when looking at the health level of any newly spawned frogs - it should be 20 HP. If it's 10 HP (the game default for frogs), then the datapack is not running. If the datapack is running, you just need to be patient or you can use the "/function hungry_frog:user_summon_uberfrog" command to spawn The ÜberFrog at your location in the world.
